data.title: Eastnine Secures SBTi Validation for Net-Zero Climate Targets by 2040
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Eastnine AB ( (SE:EAST) ) has issued an announcement.

Eastnine AB, a Swedish office-focused real estate company listed on Nasdaq Stockholm Mid Cap, operates a portfolio of office properties in rapidly expanding European markets. The group is increasingly integrating climate objectives into its business model as it seeks to strengthen its long-term competitiveness and asset value in the real estate sector.

The company has had its near- and long-term climate targets validated by the Science Based Targets initiative, confirming that its decarbonisation pathway is aligned with limiting global warming to 1.5°C. Eastnine is committing to net-zero greenhouse gas emissions across its property portfolio and value chain by 2040, with interim 2030 and 2040 targets for deep cuts in Scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions and a halt to new fossil fuel equipment, signalling a more rigorous transition plan that could influence tenant relationships, capital allocation and its positioning among climate-conscious investors.

To deliver on these targets, Eastnine plans to focus on energy efficiency upgrades, a shift to renewable energy, and lowering embodied carbon in renovations and tenant improvements. The company also highlights collaboration with tenants and suppliers as central to reducing emissions across its value chain, which may enhance operational resilience and align the portfolio more closely with tightening regulatory and market expectations on sustainable real estate.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:EAST) stock is a Hold with a SEK47.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Eastnine AB stock, see the SE:EAST Stock Forecast page.

More about Eastnine AB

Eastnine AB is a Swedish real estate company listed on Nasdaq Stockholm’s Mid Cap segment, focused on providing office properties in some of the fastest growing markets in Europe. The company operates in the real estate sector and aims to position itself as a leading office landlord by combining property management with a strong sustainability and climate strategy.

Average Trading Volume: 345,527

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: SEK4.24B

data.title: Bluerock Homes Trust Updates S-11 With 2025 Governance
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. Class A ( (BHM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Bluerock Homes Trust updated its effective S-11 registration on March 12, 2026 to incorporate audited 2025 financial statements, governance details and Part III disclosures from its upcoming 2026 proxy, and outlined a stable leadership slate led by founder and CEO R. Ramin Kamfar with a board that is 20% female and 80% ethnically diverse. The filing details the company’s board committees, director compensation, equity incentive capacity, related-party management and DST program fee flows, and significant insider and 5% shareholder ownership, giving investors clearer visibility into how management is paid, how capital is allocated through affiliates, and how governance and compliance structures operated through year-end 2025.

The company reported $10.5 million of base management fees and $4.0 million of operating expense reimbursements to its external manager for 2025, plus growing DST acquisition and asset management fees and a series of cost-sharing and joint-venture arrangements with manager affiliates. It also disclosed extensive stock ownership guidelines, anti-hedging and pledging controls, a clawback policy for incentive fees, and full compliance with Section 16 filings, while confirming Grant Thornton LLP’s continued role as auditor with $674,000 in 2025 audit fees and no incentive fees paid to the manager for 2024–2025.

The most recent analyst rating on (BHM) stock is a Buy with a $13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. Class A stock, see the BHM Stock Forecast page.

More about Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. Class A

Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. is an externally managed real estate investment trust focused on residential properties, including multifamily and build-to-rent communities, primarily in the United States. The company operates through an affiliated manager and related entities, leverages a Delaware statutory trust (DST) program and joint ventures, and uses equity incentive plans to align management and director interests with shareholders.

Average Trading Volume: 9,712

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $139.3M

data.title: Alien Metals’ JV Kicks Off RC Drilling at High-Grade Elizabeth Hill Silver Project
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Alien Metals Ltd ( (GB:UFO) ) is now available.

Alien Metals said joint venture partner West Coast Silver has begun a 4,000m reverse circulation drilling campaign at the high-grade Elizabeth Hill Silver Project near Karratha in Western Australia’s Pilbara. The programme targets shallow extensions of silver mineralisation along the Munni Munni Fault, building on 2025 high-grade results to grow the project’s footprint and support West Coast Silver’s first mineral resource estimate and future economic studies.

All planned holes are designed to intersect the key fault zone within about 150 metres of surface, a depth considered conducive to potential open-pit, lower-cost development if sufficient resources are defined. For Alien Metals, which retains a 30% free-carried interest in Elizabeth Hill, successful drilling could enhance its portfolio value and strengthen its exposure to silver alongside its core iron ore developments in the region.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:UFO) stock is a Hold with a £0.21 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Alien Metals Ltd stock, see the GB:UFO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on UFO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, UFO is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and negative free cash flow) despite improved 2024 loss and cash-burn trends and low leverage. Technicals are comparatively strong with price above key moving averages and positive MACD, while valuation remains constrained by the company’s loss-making profile and lack of dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on UFO stock, click here.

More about Alien Metals Ltd

Alien Metals Ltd is a London AIM-listed minerals exploration and development company focused primarily on iron ore and precious and base metals projects in Western Australia’s Pilbara region. Its key asset is the 90%-owned Hancock Iron Ore Project, alongside interests in the Brockman and Vivash iron ore projects and minority stakes in the Munni Munni PGM project and the high-grade Elizabeth Hill Silver Project via joint ventures.

Current Market Cap: £11.62M

data.title: Tang Palace Warns of Deeper 2025 Loss as Revenue Falls and Store Count Shrinks
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Tang Palace (China) Holdings Limited ( (HK:1181) ) is now available.

Tang Palace (China) Holdings Limited, a Chinese restaurant operator with a portfolio of self-owned and joint-venture outlets, reported weaker results for the year ended 31 December 2025 as it navigated a challenging dining market. The group’s revenues depend heavily on foot traffic and consumer confidence, making it sensitive to shifts in discretionary spending and cost pressures across the food and beverage industry.

For 2025, the company’s revenue declined 12.4% year on year to RMB894.6 million, while gross profit fell 12.6% to RMB589.8 million with gross margin broadly stable at 65.9%. The loss attributable to shareholders widened sharply to RMB59.1 million, translating to a net loss margin of 6.6% and a higher basic loss per share of 5.50 RMB cents, and the board proposed no final dividend after paying none at interim.

The group also reduced its store footprint, operating 30 self-owned and 12 joint-venture restaurants at year-end versus 32 and 17, respectively, a sign of ongoing network rationalisation. Additional pressure came from a larger negative fair value change on financial assets and losses from joint ventures, highlighting both operational headwinds and investment-related drag on earnings that may concern investors and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1181) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.19 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tang Palace (China) Holdings Limited stock, see the HK:1181 Stock Forecast page.

More about Tang Palace (China) Holdings Limited

Tang Palace (China) Holdings Limited operates a chain of self-owned and joint-venture restaurants in mainland China, focusing on Chinese cuisine and related catering services. The group targets the mid- to upper-end dining market, and its performance is closely tied to consumer spending trends and operating costs in the restaurant sector.

Average Trading Volume: 208,590

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$210.9M

Grafton Group plc has granted Chief Financial Officer David Arnold an award of 108,334 Grafton Units under the company’s 2021 Long Term Incentive Plan, according to a regulatory disclosure of a transaction by a person discharging managerial responsibilities. The award, made outside a trading venue on 25 March 2026, reinforces the company’s use of equity-based incentives to align senior executive remuneration with shareholder interests and long-term performance objectives.

The grant reflects Grafton’s continued reliance on long-term incentive structures as part of its executive compensation framework, a common practice among listed building materials distributors seeking to retain key management and drive sustained value creation. Stakeholders may view the sizeable award as a signal of confidence in the CFO’s role in steering the group’s financial strategy and supporting the company’s ongoing operational and market ambitions.

data.title: Wildcat Petroleum Wins Shareholder Backing to Become African Gold Processor and Shift to AQSE
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Wildcat Petroleum Plc ( (GB:WCAT) ) is now available.

Wildcat Petroleum shareholders have overwhelmingly approved the cancellation of the company’s London Stock Exchange Main Market listing and its application to join the Aquis Growth Market, alongside adopting a revised investment strategy to convert the business into an African gold processing company. Management aims to appoint an Aquis adviser quickly to fast-track the move, which is expected to complete within four to six weeks.

The company has also introduced a 2026 incentive plan that awards its chairman with share warrants tied to key gold-processing milestones, including securing the first deal, producing the first kilogram of gold and paying the first dividend. This structure links executive rewards to tangible operational achievements in the new gold-processing strategy, signalling a strong performance-driven focus as Wildcat reshapes its business and market positioning.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:WCAT) stock is a Sell with a £0.04 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Wildcat Petroleum Plc stock, see the GB:WCAT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on WCAT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WCAT is a Neutral.

The score is primarily weighed down by weak financial performance (no revenue, persistent losses, and ongoing cash burn), with additional pressure from bearish technical signals (price below major moving averages and negative MACD). Valuation provides limited support because earnings are negative and no dividend yield is available.

To see Spark’s full report on WCAT stock, click here.

More about Wildcat Petroleum Plc

Wildcat Petroleum Plc is transitioning its business focus to become an African gold processing company. The company plans to shift its stock market listing from the Main Market of the London Stock Exchange to the Aquis Growth Market, aligning its operations and capital markets presence with this new gold-focused strategy.

data.title: Boralex to Go Private in $9 Billion Brookfield–La Caisse Deal to Accelerate Growth
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Boralex Inc Cl A ( (TSE:BLX) ).

Boralex Inc., a Québec-based renewable energy producer with operations across Canada, the U.S., France and the U.K., has built a diversified portfolio of wind, solar, hydroelectric and storage assets over its 35-year history. The company plays a key role in supplying affordable clean power to support energy security and the energy transition in its core markets.

Boralex has entered into a definitive agreement to be acquired by Brookfield and La Caisse in an all-cash transaction valuing the company at an enterprise value of about $9.0 billion and paying shareholders $37.25 per share, a substantial premium to recent trading levels. The deal, unanimously approved by Boralex’s board, will take the company private, provide immediate liquidity and certainty of value to shareholders, and give Boralex access to deep long-term capital to accelerate its 2030 strategic plan, expand development in core markets, and maintain its Québec headquarters and employment footprint, with closing targeted by the fourth quarter of 2026.

The transaction structure includes La Caisse, already Boralex’s largest shareholder, increasing its stake to a 30% pro forma interest after closing. Backed by Brookfield’s and La Caisse’s financial strength and expertise, Boralex is expected to operate independently as a standalone private company, strengthening its industry positioning in renewables and supporting long-term value creation for stakeholders including employees, customers, First Nations, communities and suppliers.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:BLX) stock is a Hold with a C$33.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Boralex Inc Cl A stock, see the TSE:BLX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BLX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BLX is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weakened financial quality: sharply lower net income, rising leverage, and negative free cash flow that increases reliance on external financing. Technicals are supportive with a clear uptrend, but overbought signals add near-term risk. Valuation is a key constraint due to the extremely high P/E despite a moderate dividend yield, while the earnings call was constructive on growth pipeline and financing progress but acknowledged production shortfalls and ongoing (though easing) pricing headwinds.

To see Spark’s full report on BLX stock, click here.

More about Boralex Inc Cl A

Boralex Inc. is a Québec-based renewable energy producer focused on developing, building, and operating wind, solar and hydroelectric facilities, as well as energy storage projects. The company operates primarily in Canada, the United States, France and the United Kingdom, targeting growing demand for clean power driven by electrification and decarbonization trends.

Average Trading Volume: 528,680

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$3.15B

Find detailed analytics on BLX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from SSR Mining ( (TSE:SSRM) ).

SSR Mining has signed a definitive share purchase agreement to sell its 80% stake in the Çöpler gold mine and related properties in Türkiye to Cengiz Holding for $1.5 billion in cash. The deal follows an earlier memorandum of understanding between the parties and formalizes the terms of the planned divestiture.

Completion of the transaction is subject to approval by Türkiye’s General Directorate of Mining and Petroleum Affairs and other customary consents, with closing targeted for the third quarter of 2026. The sale marks a significant reshaping of SSR Mining’s asset base and geographic exposure, with potential implications for its future capital allocation and strategic focus outside Türkiye.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:SSRM) stock is a Buy with a C$37.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SSR Mining stock, see the TSE:SSRM Stock Forecast page.

The score is driven primarily by solid overall financial health (low leverage) and a strong 2025 profitability recovery, supported by constructive technical trend signals. Positive earnings-call takeaways (strong free cash flow, liquidity, reserve growth, and a sizable buyback) further support the rating, while cash-conversion quality, cost pressures/Çöpler cash drag, and execution risk across multiple operations keep the score from moving higher.

To see Spark’s full report on SSRM stock, click here.

More about SSR Mining

data.title: Man Sang International Plans Capital Reorganisation and HK$594 Million Connected Convertible Bond Issue
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Man Sang International ( (HK:0938) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Man Sang International has proposed a capital reorganisation that will reduce the par value of its existing shares from HK$0.50 to HK$0.10 and subdivide authorised but unissued shares, aligning all new shares to rank equally. The move is designed to rationalise the company’s capital structure and facilitate subsequent financing activities.

The company has also agreed to issue HK$594.26 million of 2% convertible bonds maturing in 2029, which could convert into up to about 1.49 billion new shares, significantly diluting existing holdings but strengthening its funding base. As the bonds are being subscribed for by entities connected to controlling shareholder Mr. Hu, the deal is classified as a connected transaction, requiring independent shareholders’ approval and review by an independent board committee and financial adviser, highlighting governance safeguards for minority investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0938) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.37 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Man Sang International stock, see the HK:0938 Stock Forecast page.

More about Man Sang International

Man Sang International Limited is a Bermuda-incorporated company listed in Hong Kong, with a controlling shareholder, China DaDi, holding a majority stake. The company operates under the oversight of an executive director, Mr. Hu, who controls key subscribing entities in the latest financing transaction, underscoring a highly concentrated ownership structure.

Average Trading Volume: 1,144,183

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$249.2M

For a thorough assessment of 0938 stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
